title: Place anchor
x-awen-status: reconciled 2026-07-04 — constitution/interface-layer schema (interface-contract §2/§4); no direct awen-weave craidd validator in v0.1 (the entity table carries uprn/toid only). Candidate awen-weave upstream from 0.2.0.
description: The shared geographic anchor that lets instances join on the same place. UPRN is the single most important joint between instances (interface-contract §2). All fields optional — most UPRNs are null until Town Dataset / Lleolydd coverage resolves them.

uprn.description: Unique Property Reference Number; FK joint between instances. Null tolerated.

lsoa.description: Lower Super Output Area (GSS) — for IMD / Marmot analysis.

labels.description: Bilingual place names where ONS provides both.
